title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at FedEx India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at FedEx India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!
